title: Dictyopteris beccariana
taxonomy: Dictyopteris beccariana is a species of seaweed in the family Dictyotaceae, within the class Phaeophyceae and the phylum Ochrophyta. It belongs to the kingdom Chromista, which includes various algae and fungi. This classification places Dictyopteris beccariana among the brown algae, characterized by their distinctive pigmentation. The family Dictyotaceae is a group of marine algae known for their complex thallus structure and diverse species distribution. As a member of the phylum Ochrophyta, Dictyopteris beccariana shares characteristics with other organisms in this group, such as the ability to photosynthesize.
